title: Extending the Targets for Coronavirus Antivirals Beyond That of Approved Drugs: Insights From Preclinical Research.
snippet: Antiviral drugs have been approved for the treatment of COVID-19. However, they present pharmacological limitations, a mixed efficacy profile and target just two coronavirus proteins. To extend the range of druggable coronavirus proteins, researchers explored small molecule N-glycan binders as inhibitors of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein interaction with the cell...
importanceSignals: priority topic: gene therapy, translational medicine

title: Diagnostic Accuracy and Reproducibility of ChatGPT-4o for HER2 Immunohistochemistry Scoring in Equivocal Breast Cancer Cases.
publicationName: Asian Pacific journal of cancer prevention : APJCP
journalName: Asian Pacific journal of cancer prevention : APJCP
snippet: HER2 immunohistochemistry (IHC) plays a central role in therapeutic decision-making for breast cancer. However, interpretation of equivocal (2+) IHC results remains challenging and is subject to interobserver variability, necessitating reflex in situ hybridization testing. This study evaluated the diagnostic performance and reproducibility of ChatGPT-4o, a....

title: Macrophages in Psoriasis: From Functional Heterogeneity to Metabolic Reprogramming and Novel Therapeutics.
snippet: This review provides a comprehensive overview of macrophage heterogeneity, polarisation dynamics, metabolic reprogramming and multicellular interactions of macrophages in psoriasis. We discuss how single-cell technologies have revealed diverse macrophage subsets and explore the metabolic profile of macrophages in psoriasis. Furthermore, we examine the centr...

title: Molecular Traces of Gastric Cancer in Saliva: From Tissue Signatures to Salivary SLC5A5 as a Potential Biomarker.
snippet: Early detection of gastric cancer (GC) and reliable risk stratification for metachronous gastric lesions (MGLs) remain societal and clinical challenges, particularly in intermediate risk populations. Non-invasive approaches such as saliva-based biomarkers could complement current strategies. The aim of this study was to identify and validate a tissue-based....
